properties.remark: OBSERVED MULTIPLE SPRUCE, FIR AND WHITE PINE TREES EITHER UPROOTED OR SNAPPED ALONG MARQUETTE COUNTY ROAD 607 FROM CHAMPION TO THE OTTAWA NATIONAL FOREST MCCORMICK WILDERNESS TRACT IN NORTHWESTERN MARQUETTE COUNTY. SOME LARGE MAPLE LIMBS WERE ALSO SNAPPED. DELAYED REPORT. THE COMBINATION OF WIND GUSTS OF 30 TO 40 MPH AND THE WEIGHT OF THE HEAVY WET SNOW FROM THE 30TH OF APRIL THROUGH THE 2ND OF MAY CAUSED THE TREE DAMAGE. UTILITY COMPANIES WERE ON STATION CONDUCTING RESTORATION EFFORTS IN THIS REMOTE SECTION OF MARQUETTE COUNTY.
Social media report of pea size hail and a photo of damage to the roof of a building. Report also indicated downed tree branches in the area. Time estimated by radar.
Facebook comment on WJMN Local 3s post. Time estimated by radar.
Picture report on facebook.
Social media photo of hail slightly larger than an adjacent quarter observed towards the end of CR 581. Time estimated by radar.
Report with picture.
Social Media report showing a picture of a hailstone that was estimated to be quarter sized near Johnson Lake. Time estimated by radar.
Picture on Twitter of hail stone measuremnet just under 3 cm ie 1 inch.
Several trees down. Camper windows blown out.
Dozens of trees snapped and uprooted.

Power out on the northwest side of Big Manistique Lake. Two cell towers on the north side of the lake are also out. Time of wind damage estimated by radar. From Facebook comment under Luce County 911/Emergency Managements post.
Over 20 trees blown down throughout Caspian. Report via social media.
Several trees blown down along M95.
Corrects previous tstm wnd dmg report from 2 SSE Randville. Several trees blown down along M95. Corrected time based on radar.
Convenience store worker reports trees down near North Dickinson County School. Hail also occurred but size unknown. Time estimated.
Convenience store worker reports trees down along Ride Outs Road. Hail also occurred but size unknown. Time estimated.
Report on Facebook of a tree down on a garage, couple of dead trees down, and small branches on roadways. Picture of downed tree was provided.
Mesonet station FPTM4 Fairport.

Corrects previous tstm wnd dmg report from Marquette. Sub-severe winds at the time of the event. Winds estimated at 25 mph at time of tree damage. Marquette County Central Dispatch reports power lines down and a tree on fire on north Front Street in Marquette.
Marquette County Central Dispatch reports power lines down and a tree on fire on north Front Street in Marquette.
Corrects previous tstm wnd gst report from 28 ESE Keweenaw Point. Corrects report source to C-MAN Station /STDM4/ Stannard Rock Lighthouse.
Mesonet station STDM4 Stannard Rock Lighthouse.
Buoy station 45006 West Superior Buoy.
Corrects time of previous tstm wnd dmg report from Ewen. Ontonagon County Dispatch reports a few trees of unknown size down on power lines in Ewen.
Picture of a large tree and powerline down across a road.
Ontonagon County Dispatch reports a few trees of unknown size down on power lines in Ewen.
3 large maple trees down.

U.S. Forest Service reports multiple trees and large branches downed of a wide variety of tree types scattered throughout the Sylvania Wilderness Area in eastern Gogebic County. Forest Service personnel continue to survey throughout the Ottawa National Forest. Time based on KMQT RADAR. Estimated wind gusts of 50 to 70 mph. Delayed Report.

U.S. Forest Service reports multiple trees and large branches downed of maple and fir trees along Crystal Lake Road and Birch Lake Roads in eastern Gogebic County just north of the Wisconsin State Line. Time based on KMQT RADAR. Estimated wind gusts of 50 to 70 mph. Delayed Report.

Observed a large diameter maple tree snapped around 5 feet above the trunk in Tilden Township along Marquette County Road 581. Section of tree landed in a driveway. Time of Event estimated from KMQT Radar. Estimated winds around 50 mph. Delayed report.
Pavilion blown over, large spruce tree snapped. Time estimated from radar.
Corrects time of previous tstm wnd dmg report from 1 N Marquette. Marquette County Central Dispatch reports trees down and power lines downed on Wilkinson Street in north Marquette.
Corrects time of previous tstm wnd dmg report from 1 SSW Marquette. Marquette County Central Dispatch reports downed tree on a vehicle on Altamont Street in Marquette.
Marquette County Central Dispatch reports a tree on power lines off Midway Drive in Negaunee Township. Max wind gust at WFO was 47 mph just a few minutes previous to this report.
Corrects time of previous tstm wnd dmg report from 1 WNW Harvey. Marquette County Central Dispatch reports trees and power lines downed along Reservoir Street and Quarry Road in Harvey.
Marquette County Central Dispatch reports trees down and power lines downed on Wilkinson Street in north Marquette.
Large maple tree limb downed in south Marquette. Delayed report via social media. Estimated wind gusts of 40 to 50 mph.
Report with picture on Twitter. Cluster of three trees in very close proximity to each other, all down blocking the roadway.

Marquette County Central Dispatch reports downed tree on a vehicle on Altamont Street in Marquette.
Marquette County Central Dispatch reports trees and power lines downed along Reservoir Street and Quarry Road in Harvey.

Report from social media includes description of damage and image. Observer came home and found large storage shed/carport thrown and wrapped around trees. Frame is destroyed and was anchored down. Not much damage elsewhere aside from downed tree limbs. Time estimated by radar.
Mesonet station XMAPV Minneapolis Shoal. Delayed report.
Corrects previous non-tstm wnd gst report from 1 NNE Grand Marais. GLOS Mesonet station GRMM4 Grand Marais. Delayed report.
Large trees uprooted, pole barn blown off foundation, garage door blown inside. Delayed report. Time of the report was estimated from radar.
Report called in regarding some trees down on M35 just north of Cedar River.
Alger-Delta Cooperative Electric Association shared pictures of a tree down on a power line out near Old Mill Lane on Facebook. Called in to get time and exact location information on the damage.
Corrects time previous tstm wnd dmg report from 1 NNE Cedar River. Report from mPING: 1-inch tree limbs broken; estimated wind gusts of 50 to 60 mph. Time estimated from radar.

Corrects time from previous tstm wnd dmg report from Cedar River. Report on Facebook with picture of tree down on private driveway. Also reported power outage. Time of the report estimated from radar.
Report from mPING: 1-inch tree limbs broken; estimated wind gusts of 50 to 60 mph.

Corrects previous hail report from 5 WSW Birch Creek. CoCoRaHS observation station /MI-MM-8/. Observer measured 1.00 to 1.50 inch hail between 7:30 P.M. CDT and 7:45 P.M. CDT. Severe Thunderstorm with continuous lightning and thunder. Hailed for less than five minutes total. Observed location was 4.1 miles northwest of Menominee. Report via social media.
Measured 1.00 to 1.50 inch hail between 7:30 P.M. CDT and 7:45 P.M. CDT. Observed location was 4.5 miles northwest of Menominee. Report via social media.
Corrects previous tstm wnd dmg report from 4 NNW Sands. Portion of a maple tree broke off about 10 feet up and was over the road in the Feather Ridge subdivision.

Image from social media of damage to tree in Hardwood, MI. Time estimated via radar.
Delayed report of a large tree falling near the intersection of 16th Ave and 20th St due to strong thunderstorm winds. Time estimated by radar.
